story_prompt: create a lecture on javascript function

scenes.text: Introduction to JavaScript Functions: Understanding the basic concept of functions in JavaScript, which are reusable blocks of code designed to perform a specific task.
scenes.image_prompt: flowchart TD; A[Function] -->|Uses| B(Code Block); B -->|Return| C(Output); C -->|Used in| D(JavaScript Programs);

scenes.text: Function Declaration: Explore how to declare a function using the function keyword, providing a clear understanding of syntax and structure.
scenes.image_prompt: sequenceDiagram; participant User; participant JS; User->>JS: Declare function; JS-->>User: Acknowledge syntax; User->>JS: Execute function;

scenes.text: Function Calling: Learn how to invoke a function, understanding the process of execution and interaction between declared and called functions.
scenes.image_prompt: stateDiagram-v2; [*] --> Idle; Idle --> CallFunction: Call function(); CallFunction --> Execute: Run code inside function; Execute --> [*];

scenes.text: Function Parameters and Arguments: Discover how functions can accept inputs via parameters, manipulating data with arguments for dynamic operations.
scenes.image_prompt: classDiagram; class Function{ +execute(param1, param2) +returns value } param1 : input; param2 : parameter; value : result;

scenes.text: Anonymous and Arrow Functions: Understand the modern approaches to function expressions using anonymous and arrow functions for concise syntax.
scenes.image_prompt: journey title Function Evolution; section Traditional; Function Declaration: 5; Function Expression: 4; section Modern; Anonymous Function: 3; Arrow Function: 2;
